metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace exposing the cc-enslaver discipline plugin.

plugins.name: cc-enslaver
plugins.description: A Claude Code plugin and LLM-agnostic rule pack that enforces systematic thinking, verified citations, and root-cause analysis — eliminating reactive, lazy AI behavior. v0.16 adds Stop Layer (g) file-claim verification: stop_guard parses `I edited X.py` claims and blocks Stop when disk state contradicts. Conservative — no baseline / any ambiguity → pass; CC_ENSLAVER_DISABLE_LAYER_G escape hatch.
